message:
fix(value): add Bool handling to TryFrom<Value> for f32/f64

Fixed inconsistency where:
- to_f32_lossy() and to_f64_lossy() handled Bool
- FromValue for f64 handled Bool
- But TryFrom<Value> for f32/f64 and FromValue for f32 did not

Since Bool→f32/f64 (0.0 or 1.0) has no precision loss, the strict
TryFrom conversions should also accept Bool values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
